## Type of change

- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Refactoring (`refactor`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Configuration / infra (`chore`)

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is passing (lint + types + tests)
- [ ] Tests were added for the changes
- [ ] Documentation was updated if necessary
- [ ] No credentials or secrets in the code
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md was updated
